capabilities: runFullTrust - Required for global mouse hook and input simulation
notes: Update packageIdentityName and publisherDisplayName with your Partner Center values.
Upload the .msix from the GitHub Release to Partner Center.
Microsoft will sign the MSIX automatically upon Store publication.
For sideloading, users need Developer Mode enabled in Windows Settings.
The runFullTrust capability is required and automatically approved for Desktop Bridge apps.
Screenshots in this folder are ready for upload to Partner Center.
